text:
Section 1
Short title and commencement
1. Short title and commencement

Subsection 1
This Act may be called the Demo Tax Act 2026.
(1) This Act may be called the Demo Tax Act 2026.

Subsection 2
It shall come into force at once.
(2) It shall come into force at once.

text:
Section 2
Definition of Commissioner
2. Definition of Commissioner

Subsection 1
In this Act, "Commissioner" means the Commissioner of Taxes appointed by the Board.

Explanation 1
Explanation 1. Commissioner includes an officer authorized in writing by the Board.

Proviso 1
Provided that the Board may assign jurisdiction to another tax authority.

text:
Section 3
Tax rate for a small company
3. Tax rate for a small company

Subsection 1
The rate of tax shall be 15 percent of taxable income.
(1) The rate of tax shall be 15 percent of taxable income.
